description: Group features that are different ionization forms (adducts/charge variants) of the same neutral compound using MetaboliteFeatureDeconvolution. Annotates each feature with its inferred adduct and neutral mass; writes a decharged featureXML and a consensusXML of grouped adduct families.
rules: writes decharged.featureXML and adduct_groups.consensusXML under record_store
adducts use OpenMS 'Elements:Charge:Probability' syntax (e.g. H:+:0.4), NOT bracket notation
NEGATIVE=1 selects negative ionization mode (and negative default adducts)
usage: Set INPUT (featureXML). Optional NEGATIVE=1, ADDUCTS, CHARGE_MIN/CHARGE_MAX, MASS_MAX_DIFF, RT_MAX_DIFF. Output: decharged.featureXML (+ adduct_groups.consensusXML).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates decharged.featureXML and records the reason.
